spec.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'jvm.class.loaded'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') AS `service.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'jvm.class.loaded' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') = $deployment.environment
GROUP BY `service.name`

filter.expression: (deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND service.name = $service.name AND jvm.memory.pool.name = 'G1 Eden Space')
(deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND service.name = $service.name AND jvm.memory.pool.name = 'G1 Survivor Space')
(jvm.memory.pool.name = 'G1 Old Gen' AND deployment.environment = $deployment.environment AND service.name = $service.name)
